channel.title: Blogs on Utsab's Digital Garden
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Utsab's Digital Garden

item.title: Diffusion
item.description: #diffusion #blog Title- Diffusion: A simple hands-on introduction Resources Simplest Implementation of Diffusion Models | Emilio’s Blog Generative AI has been the buzz and face of AI industry for the last few years. Particularly image and video generative models. How do they models generative an image when given a prompt? But how exactly does a model take in text prompt and transform it into a visual output catering to the context of that prompt?

item.title: List of Topics
item.description: Intro to Diffusion AlphaZero Implementation Deeper Diving into Diffusion Maths Implementing CLIP Why use Residual Networks? Data Pruning Methods? Scaling Laws? Continual Learning and the limits of plasticity
